case_title: MUSNI, DANIEL VS JOHNSON, WESLEY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLURE, MARTHA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY MUSNI, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WESLEY MCCLURE, MARTHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSNI, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WESLEY MCCLURE, MARTHA $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $672.00, DEFENDANTS FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-10-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-17-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL.
